comment: 56yo male, 20 years as coke-oven worker (integrated steelmaking, Soviet-era plant 1990-2010), no current malignancy. PAH-rich occupational exposure (IARC Group 1 Monograph 100F). Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-OCC-PAH-PREVENTION-INTENSIFIED-SURVEILLANCE (LDCT chest + urinalysis q1-2y + annual dermatologic exam + smoking-cessation counseling); alternative = IND-OCC-PAH-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION. Validates v0.3 RF-OCC-PAH-PREVENTION pilot (lung/bladder/skin risk).
